entry.title: BOA N0001915G0026 (P00017) awarded to NORTHROP GRUMMAN SYSTEMS CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO ADD A DD FORM 254 (ATTACHMENT 2) TO THE BOA FOR PMA-272.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER AIRCRAFT PARTS AND AUXILIARY EQUIPMENT MANUFACTURING

entry.title: BOA N0001915G0026 (P00018) awarded to NORTHROP GRUMMAN SYSTEMS CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO ADD THE NORTHROP GRUMMAN WOODLAND HILLS, CA FACILITY TO THE DD FORM 254 (ATTACHMENT 1). IN ADDITION, FAR CLAUSE 52.246-11 HAS BEEN ADDED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER AIRCRAFT PARTS AND AUXILIARY EQUIPMENT MANUFACTURING

entry.title: BOA N0001915G0026 (P00019) awarded to NORTHROP GRUMMAN SYSTEMS CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO ADD SECURITY CLASSIFICATION GUIDANCE AND UPDATE SECURITY LANGUAGE ASSOCIATED WITH DD FORM 254 (ATTACHMENT 1). THESE CHANGES WILL MAKE UP REVISION 7 OF DD FORM 254.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER AIRCRAFT PARTS AND AUXILIARY EQUIPMENT MANUFACTURING

entry.title: BOA N0001915G0026 (P00020) awarded to NORTHROP GRUMMAN SYSTEMS CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO PERFORM AN ANNUAL UPDATE OF THE BASIC ORDERING AGREEMENT IN ACCORDANCE WITH FAR 16.703(C)(2).

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER AIRCRAFT PARTS AND AUXILIARY EQUIPMENT MANUFACTURING

entry.title: BOA N0001915G0026 (P00021) awarded to NORTHROP GRUMMAN SYSTEMS CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO ADD THE MQ-9 REAPER AVIATION PLATFORM TO THE SOW AND ADD PMA-266 AS AN ORDERING AUTHORITY. IN ADDITION, FAR CLAUSE 52.204-25, PROHIBITION ON THE USE OR PROCUREMENT OF CERTAIN TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND VIDEO SURVEILLANCE SERVICES OR EQUIPMENT TO SECTION I.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER AIRCRAFT PARTS AND AUXILIARY EQUIPMENT MANUFACTURING

entry.title: BOA N0001915G0026 (P00025) awarded to NORTHROP GRUMMAN SYSTEMS CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)
